Index.meta_description: Plan Sweet 16s, graduations, and celebrations with RSVP management, song requests, and streaming playlist export. Free to start.
Index.hero_subtext: Create stunning Sweet 16s, graduations, and celebrations with RSVP management, guest song requests, and streaming playlist export. All in one place.
Index.hero_disclaimer: No credit card required • Free forever for small events

About.meta_description: Learn about Bashly's mission to make event planning effortless for everyone.
About.title: About Bashly
About.intro_strong: Bashly was born from a simple observation:
About.intro_rest: planning memorable events shouldn't require juggling spreadsheets, tracking RSVPs via text, and arguing over the playlist.
About.paragraph_2: We built Bashly for hosts who want to focus on what matters — celebrating with the people they love. Whether it's a Sweet 16, a graduation party, or a family reunion, every event deserves a seamless planning experience.
About.paragraph_3: Today, thousands of hosts use Bashly to manage RSVPs, collect song requests via QR code, and export perfectly curated playlists to Spotify. No apps to download. No complicated setup. Just effortless event planning.
About.mission_text: To make every celebration unforgettable by giving hosts the tools they need to plan with confidence and guests the freedom to participate without barriers.
About.why_guest_text: No apps, no accounts — guests can RSVP and request songs in seconds
About.why_music_text: QR code song requests and direct Spotify export make playlist curation effortless
About.why_free_text: Every feature you need to host your first event, completely free
About.why_care_text: From accessible design to beautiful event pages, we sweat the details so you don't have to
About.contact_intro: Have questions? Want to share feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

guest_management.title: Guest Management
guest_management.description: Track RSVPs, dietary restrictions, and +1s in one place. Export guest lists to CSV.

song_requests.description: Let guests request songs with a QR code scan. No app download required.

spotify_export.title: Spotify Export
spotify_export.description: Export approved songs directly to Spotify. One-click playlist creation.

invite_links.title: Invite Links & QR Codes
invite_links.description: Share beautiful, branded invite links or download QR codes for printed materials.

event_schedule.description: Build a timeline for your event. Share with vendors, DJs, and co-hosts.

gift_registry.title: Gift Registry
gift_registry.description: Link to your gift registries. Guests see everything on your event page.

team_roles.title: Team Roles
team_roles.description: Add co-hosts, DJs, and vendors. Everyone gets the access they need.

email_notifications.title: Email Notifications
email_notifications.description: Automated emails for invites, RSVP confirmations, and song approvals.

privacy_security.title: Privacy & Security
privacy_security.description: Your events are private by default. Share only with invited guests.

fast_reliable.title: Fast & Reliable
fast_reliable.description: Lightning-fast page loads. 99.9% uptime. Your events are always accessible.

Pricing.section_description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

PricingPage.meta_description: Choose the perfect plan for your events. Start free, upgrade anytime.
PricingPage.hero_subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
PricingPage.hero_disclaimer: During beta, all features are free. Paid plans are coming soon.
PricingPage.beta_note: All plans include unlimited email support and access to new features during beta. You won't be charged without your consent.
PricingPage.contact_note: Questions about pricing or paid plans? <contact_link>Contact us</contact_link> and we'll help you choose the right fit.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1_title: When will paid plans be available?
faq.q1_body: Paid plans are coming soon! During beta, all features are free. We'll notify you well in advance before any charges, and you'll never be charged without your explicit consent.
faq.q2_title: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
faq.q2_body: Yes. You can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, and downgrades take effect at the end of your billing cycle.
faq.q3_title: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q3_body: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe. We do not store your payment information — it's handled securely by Stripe.
faq.q4_body: Yes. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, contact us within 30 days for a full refund. No questions asked.
faq.q5_title: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
faq.q5_body: Yes! We offer 50% off all paid plans for verified nonprofit organizations. Contact us at hello@bashly.app with your EIN for verification.

FAQ.question: How do I invite guests?
FAQ.answer: Create an event, then generate invite links or QR codes from the event dashboard. Share the link and guests can RSVP and request songs.

HowItWorks.step_2_description: Share your unique link or download a QR code for physical invitations.

HowItWorks.step_4_description: Approve songs, export to Spotify, and enjoy your perfectly curated playlist.

TermsPage.meta_description: Bashly Terms of Service and conditions of use.
TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.s1_p: By accessing or using Bashly ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service.
TermsPage.s2_p: Bashly provides event management software that allows users to create events, manage RSVPs, collect song requests, and export playlists to streaming services. The Service is provided "as is" and may be modified or discontinued at any time.
TermsPage.s3_p: To use certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You are responsible for:
TermsPage.s3_li1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
TermsPage.s3_li2: All activities that occur under your account
TermsPage.s3_li4: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
TermsPage.s4_p: You agree not to use the Service to:
TermsPage.s4_li6: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
TermsPage.s5_your_text: You retain ownership of all content you upload to the Service. By uploading content, you grant Bashly a worldwide, non-exclusive license to use, store, and display your content solely to provide the Service.
TermsPage.s5_third_text: Song data is provided by third-party services (iTunes, Spotify). We are not responsible for the accuracy or availability of third-party content.
TermsPage.s6_p: Your use of the Service is subject to our <link>Privacy Policy</link>, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
TermsPage.s7_p: During the beta phase, all features are provided free of charge. When paid plans are introduced, we will notify you in advance and provide clear pricing information. You will not be charged without your explicit consent.
TermsPage.s8_p: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time if you violate these Terms. You may close your account at any time by contacting us at <email>hello@bashly.app</email>.
TermsPage.s9_p: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT. WE DO NOT GUARANTEE THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED OR ERROR-FREE.
TermsPage.s10_p: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, BASHLY SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
TermsPage.s11_p: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or through the Service. Your continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
TermsPage.s12_p: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at <email>hello@bashly.app</email>.
TermsPage.s13_p: These Terms are governed by the laws of the United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in accordance with applicable law.

PrivacyPage.meta_description: Learn how Bashly collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.s1_p: Bashly ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our event management service.
PrivacyPage.s2_you_li1: Account Information: Name, email address, password
PrivacyPage.s2_you_li2: Event Information: Event details, venue information, schedules
PrivacyPage.s2_you_li3: Guest Information: Names, email addresses, dietary restrictions, RSVP responses
PrivacyPage.s2_you_li4: Content: Photos, song requests, messages, registry links
PrivacyPage.s2_auto_li1: Usage Data: Pages viewed, features used, time spent
PrivacyPage.s2_auto_li2: Device Information: Browser type, operating system, IP address
PrivacyPage.s3_li3: Process RSVP responses and song requests
PrivacyPage.s3_li4: Communicate with you about your account
PrivacyPage.s3_li6: Detect and prevent fraud or abuse
PrivacyPage.s4_p: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with:
PrivacyPage.s4_providers_li3: File Storage: Cloudflare R2 (images, QR codes)
PrivacyPage.s4_providers_li5: Music Services: Spotify, Apple Music (playlist export)
PrivacyPage.s4_hosts_p: When you RSVP or request songs as a guest, your information is shared with the event host. This is necessary to provide the Service.
PrivacyPage.s4_legal_p: We may disclose information if required by law, court order, or government regulation, or if we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights or the safety of others.
PrivacyPage.s5_p: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. When you delete your account, we delete your personal information within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal purposes.
PrivacyPage.s6_li1: Access: Request a copy of your personal information
PrivacyPage.s6_li3: Deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
PrivacyPage.s6_li4: Portability: Export your data in a machine-readable format
PrivacyPage.s6_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at <email>privacy@bashly.app</email>.
PrivacyPage.s7_p: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including encryption in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
PrivacyPage.s8_p: The Service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 13, please contact us immediately.
PrivacyPage.s9_p: If you are accessing the Service from outside the United States, your information will be transferred to and processed in the United States. By using the Service, you consent to this transfer.
PrivacyPage.s10_p: The Service may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., gift registries, Spotify). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties.
PrivacyPage.s11_p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or through the Service. Your continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance.
PrivacyPage.s12_p: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at <email>privacy@bashly.app</email>.

ContactPage.meta_description: Get in touch with the Bashly team.
ContactPage.title: Get in Touch
ContactPage.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Choose the best way to reach us.
ContactPage.general_desc: Questions about Bashly or beta access
ContactPage.bugs_desc: Found an issue? Let us know
ContactPage.beta_p1: Bashly is currently in beta. We're actively gathering feedback from early users to improve the platform. If you encounter issues or have suggestions, please reach out — your input directly shapes the future of Bashly.
ContactPage.beta_p2: We typically respond within 24 hours during weekdays.
